targets.query:
from(bucket: "machine_data")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_status")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.machine_id == "machine4")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r.availability, _time: r._time}))
  |> last()

from(bucket: "machine_data")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_status")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.machine_id == "machine4")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r.production_count, _time: r._time}))
  |> last()

from(bucket: "machine_data")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_status")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.machine_id == "machine4")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r.downtime, _time: r._time}))
